summary: Iteration 182: Checkout Flow Pack 1 Polish Testing - 19/19 backend tests passed (100%), Frontend fully verified after restart. All 3 checkout stages working correctly with bank details, payment proof upload, and account CTA.
test_credentials: No login required for guest checkout flow
seed_data_creation: Created test orders during E2E testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Checkout flow Pack 1 Polish fully tested. Key findings: (1) All 3 stages working correctly - Details, Payment & Proof, Confirmation, (2) Step bar labels are 'Cart', 'Details', 'Payment & Proof' as required, (3) Bank details from /api/public/payment-info endpoint displaying correctly (CRDB BANK, KONEKT LIMITED, 015C8841347002, CORUTZTZ), (4) Payment reference prominently displayed with copy button, (5) File upload dropzone supports JPG/PNG/WebP/PDF up to 10MB, (6) Payment proof form has all required fields (payer name, amount, reference, method, date, notes), (7) Stage 3 shows 'Payment Proof Submitted' with 'What happens next' block, (8) Account CTA appears after proof submission (Create Account or Login based on email), (9) Continue Browsing button navigates to marketplace, (10) Empty cart shows 'Your cart is empty' with Browse Marketplace button. NOTE: Frontend restart was required to see latest code changes - hot reload may have been caching old version.

backend_tests.checkout_missing_fields: PASS - Returns 400 for missing required fields
backend_tests.checkout_success: PASS - Creates order with order_number, total, bank_details
backend_tests.payment_proof_success: PASS - Submits proof and returns account_info
backend_tests.e2e_checkout_flow: PASS - Complete flow from checkout to proof submission

stage1_details.step_bar: PASS - Shows Cart, Details, Payment & Proof
stage1_details.contact_form: PASS - Name, company, email, phone fields
stage1_details.delivery_form: PASS - Address, city, country, notes fields

stage2_payment.bank_details_block: PASS - Shows bank name, account name, account number, branch, SWIFT, currency
stage2_payment.payment_reference: PASS - Order number prominently displayed with copy button
stage2_payment.copy_buttons: PASS - Copy buttons for all bank detail fields
stage2_payment.file_upload_dropzone: PASS - Drag & drop area with file type guidance
stage2_payment.proof_form: PASS - Payer name, amount, reference, method, date, notes

stage3_confirmation.success_message: PASS - 'Payment Proof Submitted' with order number
stage3_confirmation.order_summary: PASS - Shows order items and total
stage3_confirmation.account_cta: PASS - Create Account or Login button based on email

frontend_tests.empty_cart: PASS - Shows 'Your cart is empty' with Browse Marketplace button
